aiPluginUtterances.utterance: Add Insights To Upcoming Visit Prep

GenAiPlugin.description: Prepares for a visit with a KAM

genAiPluginInstructions.description: I have added Head to Head Study- Immunexis VS Rheumatrexate to your call prep. It is 12:00pm and your upcoming visit is 2 hours away. Do you want to start preparation?

GenAiPlugin.scope: Prepares for a visit with a KAM.
